items.name_en: 💖Complete with original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Ophidia series blends Gucci's heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. items.name_en: 💖Complete with original retail packaging💖【New】The Padlock series makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, unlocking various carrying styles. This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.
items.name_cn:
💖Complete with original retail packaging💖【New】The Padlock series makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, unlocking various carrying styles. This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.
Acid Red GG interlaced pattern coated fabric
Acid Red leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Acid Red cotton lining
Interior: One open pocket
Exterior: One open pocket
Handle (6cm high)
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (Height: 57cm – 62cm; Length: 103cm – 123cm)
Padlock clasp with leather key charm
Model: 838999.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Color: Acid Red/Embossed.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖【New】MIU Vintage Crossbody Dumpling Bag, brand new soft calfskin, full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged steel hardware, premium and elegant texture. The bag features a drawstring closure, with fine pleated ruffles that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered compartment. A unique design that looks good on everyone.

items.name_en: 💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
💖Full Original Retail Packaging💖MIUMIU 24ss Autumn/Winter New Baguette Bag
The baguette design leads new trends, full of 'girly sentiment' centered around an intellectual vibe, a free-spirited and chic big sister style showing a casual attitude, revealing the unique charm of a Miu Miu girl. Just the right size, sweet yet spicy or cool and handsome, and the capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical, it's hard not to love it!
Model: 5BD265.
Size: 28x11x15cm.
Color: Brown Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] Classic GG Small Bucket Bag. A small bucket bag featuring the charm of the classic GG canvas. Deep brown leather trim and light gold-tone hardware enhance the charm of the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable and detachable red and green striped webbing strap is threaded through the leather loops on the sides and fastened over the hardware rings, giving this bag more functionality and structure. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, brown leather trim, light gold-tone hardware; cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 card pocket, detachable webbed shoulder strap (45cm high) hook closure, weight: approx. 0.35kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to the leather accessories, blending a modern small leather good with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant black mini shoulder bag. Black GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag. Quilted leather and the brand's classic interlocking letter motif have become the symbol of the GG Marmont series. This small shoulder bag is crafted in black leather, featuring a fresh fusion of the small double-G element. Black quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware. As a Gucci Tag selected item, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Suede-feel microfiber lining, double-G, inside: one open pocket, strap: 23.5cm (height) zipper closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖[New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Extra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Extra Mini Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This extra mini bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected classic GG grained leather. The design is carefully paired with a chain shoulder strap, and a detachable leather shoulder strap is included.
Black GG Grained Leather
Cotton-Linen Blend Lining
Leather Strap (97-101cm long); Chain Strap (48cm long)
Detachable Chain Strap (50cm high)
Zipper Closure
Extra Mini Dimensions: 20-23cm (W) x 12cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 240g

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Classic Gucci Margaret details paired with emerging brand signature elements. The Queen Margaret series bags are made of GG Supreme canvas, a versatile material that continues to play an important role in paying tribute to the brand's origins. 70s vintage design bee motif, set with glass pearls and colored crystals. The buckle that forms this small handbag! Suede-feel microfiber lining.
